import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Instagram, Facebook, Youtube, Phone, Mail, MapPin, MessageCircle } from 'lucide-react'; const ADMIN_WHATSAPP = '919999999999'; function FitnationLogo({ size = 32 }) { return ( ); } export default function Footer() { return (
